leadText: The Roto Bargain (Japanese: やすうりポン Roto Bargain) is a Rotom Power introduced in Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Bag item [ edit | edit source ] When used in the overworld, prices of products at Poké Marts are reduced by 50%. The effect lasts for 10 minutes.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Bag item [ edit | edit source ] Games Description US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA One of the Rotom Powers. It reduces the prices of products at Poké Marts by half. S V ZA One of the Rotom Powers. When used, it reduces the prices of products at Poké Marts by half.
